column2: Verify System Failure to Identify New Hazards Introduced by an AI Component
column3: ['Set up the environment with a new AI component that introduces potential hazards not identifiable by the system. ', 'Request the system to identify and pass any new hazards introduced by this AI component back up to system-level safety processes for mitigation as derived requirements. ', 'Verify that no hazard is passed or an error message is displayed indicating failure. ']
column4: ['The AI component is successfully integrated into the system. ', 'The system receives the request to identify and pass new hazards from the AI component. ', "No hazard is passed, or an appropriate error message is shown, confirming the system's inability to correctly identify and handle the new hazards introduced by the AI component. "]
